planName: Food Page, Meal System & Navigation Restructure
parallelNote: Wave 2 and Wave 3 can run in parallel after Wave 1 — they touch different pages with no shared state.

tasks.title: Simplify Track page to Today's Log only
tasks.description: Strip the Track page (src/pages/Track.tsx) from its 3-column grid layout down to a single-column page showing only Today's Log. Keep: Track heading with date/time, date picker popover with calendar, yesterday/today toggle, status row (BM count, fluid intake, water only), Today's Log vertical timeline (all log entries, tappable to expand). Remove from this page (but do NOT delete the components): NutritionCard, NutritionCardErrorBoundary, BowelSection, QuickCapture, AiInsightsSection, ConfettiBurst, the 3-column responsive grid (grid-cols-[3fr_4fr_3fr]). These components are reused by Home (Wave 3) and Insights (Wave 2 task 2). The page should render as a clean single-column timeline.
acceptanceCriteria: Track page renders single-column layout (no 3-column grid)
Track page shows: heading with date/time, date picker, yesterday/today toggle, status row, Today's Log timeline
NutritionCard is NOT rendered on Track page
BowelSection is NOT rendered on Track page
QuickCapture is NOT rendered on Track page
AiInsightsSection is NOT rendered on Track page
ConfettiBurst is NOT rendered on Track page
None of the removed components are deleted from the codebase — only removed from Track.tsx imports/render
Yesterday/Today toggle still works
Log entries are tappable to expand details
bun run typecheck passes
bun run build succeeds
Browser verification at /track: clean timeline, no nutrition card or Dr. Poo

verification.testPolicy: Tests must be updated to reflect new behavior. Never simplify or remove assertions to make tests pass — update them to match the new reality.

tasks.title: Move Dr. Poo Report into Insights page
tasks.description: Update src/pages/Insights.tsx to render the AiInsightsSection component in the 'Dr. Poo Report' tab (replacing the placeholder text). Import AiInsightsSection from @/components/track/dr-poo/AiInsightsSection. Verify that AiInsightsSection works outside Track page context — it uses its own hooks (useLatestSuccessfulAiAnalysis, useStore for AI status). The SyncedLogsProvider is already wired up for /insights in W1-T02. If AiInsightsSection depends on any Track-specific context/props, extract what's needed.
acceptanceCriteria: Insights page 'Dr. Poo Report' tab renders AiInsightsSection
AiInsightsSection renders correctly at /insights (no crashes, no missing context)
Patterns tab still works (lazy-loads PatternsPage)
Tab switching between Patterns and Dr. Poo Report works
bun run typecheck passes

tasks.title: Home page layout with greeting and nutrition summary
tasks.description: Build the Home page (src/pages/Home.tsx) with: (1) Time-of-day greeting ('Good morning/afternoon/evening') with user's first name from Clerk useUser(). (2) Compact nutrition summary: CircularProgressRing (reuse existing) on the left, two horizontal progress bars on the right stacked vertically — orange bar for calories '{consumed} / {goal} kcal', blue bar for fluids '{consumed} / {goal} ml'. Data from useSyncedLogs for today's food/fluid logs, goals from useProfileContext() → nutritionGoals (dailyCalorieGoal default 1850, dailyWaterGoalMl default 2000). Layout matches PRD: ring + bars side by side, not stacked. Follow existing dark theme tokens (emerald, teal, orange accents).
acceptanceCriteria: Home page shows time-of-day greeting with user's first name
Nutrition summary shows CircularProgressRing on left
Calorie bar shows '{consumed} / {goal} kcal' with orange fill
Fluid bar shows '{consumed} / {goal} ml' with blue fill
Ring and bars are laid out side-by-side (flex-row), not stacked vertically
Data is live — logging food/fluid elsewhere updates the summary reactively
Default goals used when nutritionGoals not set (1850 kcal, 2000 ml)
bun run typecheck passes
Browser verification at /: greeting renders, nutrition summary shows live data

verification.testPolicy: Tests must be updated to reflect new behavior. Never simplify or remove assertions to make tests pass — update them to match the new reality.

tasks.title: Meal slot chips, favourites, recent, and frequent sections on Home
tasks.description: Add to Home page: (1) Meal slot chips row — Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner, Snack as tappable pills. Auto-detect active slot from time of day (reuse getActiveMealSlot pattern from useNutritionStore). Tapping overrides the slot. (2) Favourites section (slot-scoped) — reads foodFavourites from profile, filters by foodFavouriteSlotTags for active slot. Shows up to 7 FoodRow items with heart toggle and (+) to stage. 'Show more' loads next 7. Empty state: 'No favourites for {slot}'. (3) Recent section — last 7 unique foods logged in active slot from synced logs. (4) Frequent section — top 7 foods by log count for active slot. (5) Food chips — compact tappable pills above full sections, order: favourites → frequent → recent. Tapping stages with default portion. (6) Wire up staging — initialize useNutritionStore, ADD_TO_STAGING + OPEN_STAGING_MODAL on (+) tap, render LogFoodModal. Create src/hooks/useSlotScopedFoods.ts hook for recent/frequent computation.
acceptanceCriteria: Meal slot chips render: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner, Snack
Active slot auto-detected from time of day
Tapping a slot chip overrides the active slot
Favourites section shows up to 7 items filtered by active slot's tags
Favourites section has 'Show more' to load next 7
Empty favourites state shows 'No favourites for {slot}'
Recent section shows last 7 unique foods for active slot
Frequent section shows top 7 foods by count for active slot
Food chips render as tappable pills (favourites → frequent → recent order)
Tapping a chip stages food with default portion and opens LogFoodModal
Heart toggle works on all FoodRow instances (add/remove favourite)
(+) button stages food and opens LogFoodModal
useSlotScopedFoods hook correctly computes recent and frequent per slot
bun run typecheck passes
Browser verification: slot chips switch content, food rows appear, staging works

verification.testPolicy: Tests must be updated to reflect new behavior. Never simplify or remove assertions to make tests pass — update them to match the new reality.

tasks.title: Modifier chips and Quick Capture on Home
tasks.description: Add to Home page: (1) Modifier chip row — icon chips for Sleep, Stress, Mood, Activity, Medication, Cigarettes, Supplements. Tapping each opens its existing logging flow (reuse the habit/modifier logging components from Track — QuickCaptureTile or the modal flows). (2) Quick Capture section — import and render the existing QuickCapture component from src/components/track/quick-capture/QuickCapture.tsx. This shows one-click logging tiles for regular items (brush teeth, coffee, tea, sleep). Verify it works outside Track page context (it may depend on SyncedLogsContext which is already provided). Streamlined visual: compact cards, minimal chrome, no customisation UI.
acceptanceCriteria: Modifier chip row shows icons for Sleep, Stress, Mood, Activity, Medication, Cigarettes, Supplements
Tapping a modifier chip opens its existing logging flow (modal or sheet)
Quick Capture section renders on Home page

One-tap logging works — tap a tile, item is logged with current timestamp, no confirmation needed
QuickCapture works correctly outside Track page context (no crashes)
bun run typecheck passes
Browser verification: modifier chips open flows, Quick Capture tiles log items

tasks.title: Search bar and water quick-action on Home
tasks.description: Add to Home page: (1) Search bar with placeholder 'Search or type a food...' and a 'Log Food' button beside it. Typing triggers the existing searchFoodRegistry() function (Fuse.js fuzzy search from useNutritionStore). Results render as FoodRow components with heart toggle and (+) to stage. This mirrors the existing NutritionCard search UX. (2) Water droplet icon button near the nutrition summary. Tapping opens the existing WaterModal component. Logging water updates the fluid bar in real-time via the synced logs subscription.
acceptanceCriteria: Search bar renders with placeholder 'Search or type a food...'
Log Food button beside search bar
Typing triggers fuzzy search against food registry
Search results show as FoodRow list with heart toggle and (+) to stage
Water droplet icon button visible near nutrition summary
Tapping water button opens WaterModal
Logging water via modal updates the fluid bar in real-time
bun run typecheck passes
Browser verification: search works, water modal works, fluid bar updates

tasks.title: Dr. Poo touchpoints on Home
tasks.description: Add two Dr. Poo touchpoints to Home page: (1) 'Ask Dr. Poo' button at top of page — tapping opens the ConversationPanel as a slide-out sheet or modal (not full page navigation). Reuse existing ConversationPanel from src/components/track/dr-poo/ConversationPanel.tsx. (2) Proactive card at bottom of page — shows the latest AI-summarized message (max 150 chars, not truncated but summarized). Card has two actions: 'Got it' (dismiss via local state, not persisted) and 'Chat with Dr. Poo' (opens conversation panel with topic pre-loaded). Card content: if latest aiAnalysis insight exists, show its summary; otherwise show a time-based prompt (e.g. 'Have you logged lunch?' based on time of day and missing logs).
acceptanceCriteria: 'Ask Dr. Poo' button renders at top of Home page with Dr. Poo branding
Tapping 'Ask Dr. Poo' opens ConversationPanel as sheet/modal (not full navigation)
Proactive card renders at bottom of Home page
Card shows latest AI-summarized message (max 150 chars) or time-based prompt
'Got it' button dismisses the card (local state)
'Chat with Dr. Poo' button opens conversation panel
Card updates based on latest aiAnalysis data
bun run typecheck passes
Browser verification: both touchpoints render, conversation panel opens/closes

verification.testPolicy: Tests must be updated to reflect new behavior. Never simplify or remove assertions to make tests pass — update them to match the new reality.
